purpose: An optional, owner- or reviewer-scoped rubric for checking whether this asset expresses its declared judgment and boundaries on named cases.

dimensions.name: Actionable specificity
dimensions.question: Suggestions specific enough to act on?

dimensions.name: Boundary awareness
dimensions.question: Recognized when task is outside scope?

dimensions.name: Self-check pass rate
dimensions.question: Of N self-checks, how many can the response answer 'yes'?

review_boundary.evaluator: Name the asset owner or reviewer who applies this rubric.
review_boundary.acceptance: Define case-specific expectations for in-scope direction, out-of-scope restraint, conflict deference, and projection completeness before review.
review_boundary.forbidden_inference: These scores do not prove model-intelligence gain, carrier superiority, universal correctness, or intrinsic asset quality.
